content.en:
Ye Tian's speed and movements were extremely fast, one by one the emperors were killed by him, and the other emperors got the news and fled as soon as possible, not daring to stay in this area, otherwise they would be killed if they met Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian's actions like this are naturally easy to be blocked.

this day.

Ye Tian sensed the aura of the three ancient demon levels, but he didn't try to escape, but instead met him.

If you kill three ancient demon levels, you can also get a lot of battle points!

But.

Just when they were fighting with these three Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, these three Ancient Demon-level powerhouses all burst out with the power of the Ultimate Rule Realm Prototype, and all of them entered the third form.

At this moment, the aura of the three ancient demon-level powerhouses was terrifying to the extreme.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian was knocked out by a blow, and his body was like ~ Buddha was about to crack.

However, he didn't suffer too serious injuries, just a little caught off guard.

Immediately, he also unleashed his pinnacle ultimate arcane art, the armor of the Arrow, and exerted the second form of the True Lin form, the Red Lin form, to the extreme.

Rumble!!

The three Nuchi Ancient Demons continued to attack, and the top ultimate arcane killed them, but this time they did not break through the armor of the Arrow Mother on Ye Tian's body.

"What, didn't break the defense!"

The three Nuchi Ancient Demons were shocked.

But it was quickly seen that the armor on Ye Tian's body was formed by the peak ultimate arcane.

This is the pinnacle of ultimate arcane, but it is even more difficult than comprehending the ultimate rule realm.

Now.

With the blessing of the Ultimate Rules, Ye Tian was already not afraid of these three ancient demon-level powerhouses.

Moreover, Ye Tian also displayed the pinnacle ultimate arcane - Aromu Sword Light!

He used the sword light of Aromu to attack the Ha Ying Ancient Demon, one of the three ancient demon-level powerhouses, and the Ha Ying Gu Mo knew the power of this blow, and immediately protected himself with a top-notch ultimate arcane - the Aurora Shadow Shield.

However.

The Aurora Shadow Mask faced the pinnacle-level ultimate arcane Arcane Aromu sword light, and it was directly penetrated, and the Aromu sword light even penetrated the ancient demon-level body of the Ha Ying Ancient Demon.

Under this blow, Ha Ying Gu Demon's body was shattered by a small half, and he was already seriously injured.

"Another pinnacle-level ultimate arcane!"

Nuchi Ancient Demon was shocked.

Thundered!!!

They continued to kill Ye Tiandi, but they were injured again and again under Ye Tian's Luo Mu's sword light, and their injuries became more and more serious.

On the other hand, Ye Tian, with the armor of Aromu, the defense was not broken, and it was difficult to cause huge damage to Ye Tian just by virtue of the shock.

Gradually, they already had the idea of retreating.

"Let's go!"

Nuchi Ancient Demon gave up, and they quickly retreated with the Haying Ancient Demon.

Ye Tian didn't chase and kill, these three ancient demon-level powerhouses were the top one under the top ancient demon-level powerhouses, and their combat power was not much worse than some weaker top-level ancient demons.

Ye Tian could defeat them, but it was still difficult to kill them, unless he could create a form secret method that suited him and cultivate to the second form, he would be able to kill these ancient demon-level powerhouses.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian also looked for other main emperor-level powerhouses and even ancient demon-level powerhouses, and killed them to obtain battle points.

It's just that those emperor-level and even ancient demon-level powerhouses have avoided this area, and it is not easy to kill more emperor-level and ancient demon-level powerhouses.

......

Dom Fortress.

The Nuchi Ancient Demons are back, and they are the first to see the Doha Ancient Demons.

"Doha Ancient Demon, we give up this mission!"

"Give up, why?"

Doha Ancient Demon asked.

He saw that the three ancient demon-level powerhouses were injured, and he also had a guess in his heart, but he didn't want to believe that result.

Nuchi Ancient Demon said: "We can't beat the sky!"

"What, you can't beat the sky, how is this possible, you have also comprehended the ultimate rule realm, and you also have the top ultimate arcane, and you have also cultivated the form secret method to the third form. Even if the heaven comprehends the realm of ultimate rules, but the physical body is inferior to you, the realm is not as good as yours, even if you are suppressed by the Huoxi space-time battlefield, you will not be able to defeat him!"

Nuchi Ancient Demon said helplessly: "You underestimate the strength of the sky, he has created the peak ultimate arcane, and it is two peak ultimate arcane, one defense, one attack, our attack can not break the opponent's defense, but the opponent's attack can hurt us." "

"Two Pinnacle Ultimate Arcane !!!!"

The ancient demons of Doha were dumbfounded.

You know, even if it is him, he still hasn't comprehended the peak ultimate arcane! I didn't expect Ye Tian to surpass a top ancient demon-level powerhouse like him in this regard!

Nuchi Ancient Demon is not an opponent, it is impossible to kill Ye Tian, and the Doha Ancient Demon will force it.

He felt that even if he made a move, under the suppression of the Huoxi space-time battlefield, the hope of killing Ye Tian was not very high, unless a number of top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses made a move, or those top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses who were almost invincible, they could easily kill Ye Tian.

But that would undoubtedly break the rules, and the consequences were not something he could bear!

In other words, he can't help Ye Tian now, so he can only choose to give up.

......

After a period of time, Ye Tian gathered enough battle points, and he also became low-key, and no longer killed the emperor-level or ancient demon level of other main departments, otherwise he would completely anger those fortresses, and they would send a group of terrifying ancient demon-level powerhouses, and they would be in trouble.

Therefore, he returned to the Arrowmu Fortress and exchanged all the battle points on his body for the form secret method for the first time.

In the days that followed, he studied the form secret method at the Arromu Fortress, and obtained the essence from it to create a form secret method that suited him.

Time flies, and Ye Tian's research has created many ancient magic opportunities.

He even conducted countless experiments with his own replica body in the outside world, and also created a lot of form secret methods, but almost all of them were flawed.

But under his continuous improvement, these defects were removed little by little, and he continued to fuse and refine these incomplete form secret methods.

As long as you continue to study like this, the secret method of the form that suits you most closely will inevitably be created!

In this way, hundreds of thousands of ancient demon epochs passed.

During this period of time, the development of the Dragon Disciple Tribe was quite good, and several emperor-level powerhouses were born in the Eagle Tribe.

And the Dragons Warband also has an emperor-level fall, but the overall is okay.

As for Ye Tian, he is about to realize the secret method of forming a form that fits him.
